agent_raw: The evaluation methodology is sound. The apparent contamination concern — heavy oversampling of rare positives creating many near-duplicate images — does not apply here because augmentation is fold-local and occurs on the fly inside training folds only. The nested cross-validation splits are performed at the original-image level before any augmentation, so no augmented image can appear in validation or test splits by construction. The part-level physical-unit clustering prevents the same physical unit from having images in both training and validation. The final test set uses raw images from a later production week, providing temporal separation from the development data. The claim is correctly limited to this camera setup and manufacturing process. There is no methodological flaw in this evaluation; the suspicious features are all resolved by the described pipeline design.
